title: Enable and configure the dupl linter.
body:
Adds the dupl linter and adds configuration in accordance with issue #128 

Fixes: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/issues/128

comments.body:
> Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Resubmitted in a sense (`--amend --allow-empty` and force-pushing) to trigger potentially more interesting logged errors when performing the `rpm-build:centos-stream-{9,10}-x86:64:containers-common-centos` jobs. These jobs broke last, with backend logs suggesting builder-live.log did not exist and could not be gzipped. This time it didn't fail, based on the same diff, without rebasing. So that's good, I guess.
